title: Lead Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at NASSCOM Foundation
jsonLd.description:
NASSCOM Foundation invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About NASSCOM Foundation:
NASSCOM Foundation is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NASSCOM Foundation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
